degree.zh: 车辆工程 · 硕士研究生

description.zh: 毕业设计方向：行星排混合动力非道路车辆动力域控制策略研究（电机控制策略）。
description.en: Thesis direction: powertrain domain control strategy for planetary-gear hybrid off-road vehicles (motor control).

degree.zh: 车辆工程 · 工学学士

description.zh: 汽车工程学院。系统学习汽车构造、车辆理论、机械设计、嵌入式与控制工程，并深度参与学生工作与学科竞赛。
description.en: School of Automotive Engineering. Coursework in automotive structure, vehicle theory, mechanical design, embedded systems, and control engineering, with active involvement in student leadership and competitions.
